judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes the core wash action, but it omits two source-backed required actions: apply sterile dressing if needed after washing and consult a skin specialist for any confirmed skin exposure. It also weakens escalation by limiting care-seeking to ongoing irritation only. Extra details like soap, 15–20 minutes, and drying are not grounded in the provided truth.
